extra.reason: Resolved: required lint/build-test CI now runs Rust fmt, strict clippy, release build, and tests; pre-existing clippy warnings were cleared.
Completed OSS hardening pass: fixed public identity/docs, Beads config/prefix drift, installer/release packaging, CI gates, clippy warnings, security policy, and verified build/test/security checks.

Completed A+ OSS polish pass: added Makefile quality gates, docs link checker, release packaging smoke, isolated installer smoke, support and roadmap docs, stronger release docs, CI docs-link checks, and clean final validation.
Merged PR #41 after updating solo-maintainer GitHub rulesets for Lantern, Sweetgrass, and Marsh. GitHub CI passed and live Lantern smoke passed.
Cut Lantern v2026.7.0: version bump merged, tag pushed, release workflow succeeded, assets published, and public installer smoke passed.

Fixed release signing: configured local SSH allowed-signers, added release signing smoke check, documented signed annotated tag flow, and hardened release workflow to reject unsigned or unverified tags.
